name: Peanut Butter Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine butter or margarine, brown sugar, granulated sugar, egg, and vanilla extract. Mix until well blended.
3. Stir in peanut butter, sifted flour, baking soda, and salt until smooth.
4. Fold in oats and chocolate chips.
5. Spread mixture into an 8x8 inch greased baking pan.
6. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Allow the bars to cool completely before cutting into squares.
